---
title: "Johanna Batty"
---

## Johanna Batty

**Dates:** (1830/1-1894)

### Description

contributor to <i>MP</i> as Ivanovna (1862-91), social worker and writer

### Biography

She lived with her mother (born in South Africa, daughter of Sir John Barrow Bt., 1764-1848, the geographer) and sister at 140 Hampstead Road in London.  She collaborated with CMY on a guide to charities of England but it is not clear whether it was published [1851, 1881 census]. 

### Letters

- Letter from 16 July [1867]
- Letter from Whit Monday [10 June]1867
- Letter from June 18th [1866]
- Letter from Jan 9th [1866]
- Letter from April 3d 1862

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
